commit_scope: Extend form-loader.fk with fl-prelude-list — split the `; preludes:` declaration into the ordered list of dependency paths the loader loads (the next decision after dialect detection). Completes the loader's pure decision brain. Also grounds the execution model: validate.sh compiles BML via form-source-compile-file to a content-hash s-expr cache then runs it (NOT in-kernel registration, disproved live). Verdict 255 -> 4095 four-way.
evidence_refs: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/form-loader.fk form-stdlib/tests/form-loader-band.fk -> '✓ ... → 4095' and 'fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables)' and '1 ok, 0 divergent — kernels agree on every sample.'

fl-prelude-list splits the prelude line into an ordered list with only cons/list (no str_split/append/reverse natives): walk left-to-right cons-ing tokens, skip empty tokens (the leading space), then fl-rev restores declared order. The band proves: fl-prelude-list 'preludes: a.fk b.fk' -> (a.fk b.fk) with len 2, nth 0 = a.fk, nth 1 = b.fk; a no-preludes source -> empty list. New checks c8..c11 add 256+512+1024+2048; total 4095.

A DIVERGENCE was caught and root-caused, not waved: the first band run gave TS 'unterminated list' while Go/Rust/fkwu computed 4095. Cause was MY band: the final (add ...) chain had 11 add-opens (c0..c10) needing 11 closes + 1 do-close = 12, but I wrote 11. Go/Rust/fkwu lenient-auto-closed at EOF; TS strict-rejected. Fix: balanced the parens (one more close) -> all four agree at 4095, 0 divergent. (TS was correct to reject.)

Execution model grounded for the focused build (task_cce25328): a live test of (compile_source_text '...def myf()...' ...) then (myf) -> 'unbound function myf', so compile does NOT register callable defs. The real path is validate.sh's: detect 'section [' -> driver (form-source-compile-file <src> <out>) run with the compiler chain -> compiled s-expr written to a content-hash cache (form-stdlib/.cache/source-compiled) -> run the cache + s-expr preludes. read_file/cons/list exist; str_split/append/reverse do not (reverse built as fl-rev).

Edges: docs/coherence-substrate/INDEX.md row updated (4095 + the grounded execution model). Primitive discipline: only core.fk primitives (str_find, substring, str_len, str_eq, ge, lt, eq, add, len, head, tail, cons, list, nth, if); no sub/mul/div, no 3-arg and.

fourth_arm_outputs: form-loader: verdict 4095, fourth arm 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables), 1 ok, 0 divergent — kernels agree (after the paren-balance fix that resolved the TS-only divergence)

ci_validation.notes: CI re-runs validate.sh for the extended recipe + band + bumped manifest row.

deploy_validation.notes: A Form stdlib recipe extension + proof band; no public HTTP endpoint change. Next: the execution loader (form-source-compile-file -> cache -> run) behind form-cli run, and the ask+ repair (task_cce25328).

phase_gate.reason: Local four-way validation passed (verdict 4095, 0 divergent, the TS divergence root-caused + fixed); CI and merge remain pending. The host-io execution loader is the named focused next step.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The loader's pure decision brain is complete in Form: dialect (bml/sexpr) + the ordered prelude dependency list, all four-way proven. A Form-native loader can now consume these decisions + the grounded compile pipeline; the wrappers' hand-listing is fully replaceable.
public_endpoints: none changed; the recipe is a Form stdlib body proven by validate.sh
test_flows: Four-kernel proof: BML/s-expr detection, prelude-line extraction, and ordered prelude-list splitting all agree at verdict 4095 with 0 divergent.
